center.name: 阿斯多县
center.summary: 阿斯多县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Orange bullfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Orange bullfinch are scarcely found in the forests of Astore District and Diamer and Kaghan and Neelum Valley District

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Orange bullfinch are scarcely found in the forests of Astore District and Diamer and Kaghan and Neelum Valley District
